message:
feat(freeze): Add two-tier frozen architecture

Split frozen code into two tiers:
1. frozen_runtime.c/h - Shared helpers (SMI ops, comparisons, bitwise)
   - Pre-compiled once as part of WASM build
   - Contains: frozen_add, frozen_sub, frozen_lt, etc.
   - Reduces per-project compile time

2. frozen_functions.c - Per-project user functions
   - Generated for each project's hot functions
   - Now just includes frozen_runtime.h instead of inline helpers

This reduces code duplication and build times since the shared
helpers don't need to be recompiled for each project.

Benchmark: fib(35) = 23.54ms (2x faster than Bun, 3x faster than Node)
